children.text: Who knew bar soap could be so much better? Our hydrating bar soap is made with luxurious organic coconut, olive, and palm oils that naturally moisturize, condition, and soothe skin. Nourishing, rich lather makes it the perfect cleansing bar for babies and bodies of all ages. Available in 3 delightful scents.

Available in 3 scents: Tangerine Vanilla, Lavender, and Juniper Sage 
Net Wt. 5 oz. (140 g)
